scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.dev:wasm: npm run build:wasm && concurrently "npm run dev:backend:wasm" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend:wasm: cross-env ENGINE_RUNTIME=wasm npm run dev --workspace backend
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:wasm && npm run test --workspace backend && npm run test --workspace frontend
